entries.title: Against Jovinianus 1.24 on first-chronicles 22:8
entries.excerpt: Because he was a man of blood—the reference is not, as some think, to his wars, but to the murder [of Uriah]—he was not permitted to build a temple of the Lord.

entries.title: COMMENTARY ON THE GOSPEL OF JOHN 10.257 on first-chronicles 22:8
entries.excerpt: As a man of blood, David was prevented from constructing it; he seems, at least, to have been occupied concerning the gathering of the material of the temple.
